title: Blockgame Loot Buttons
description: Adds loot all, loot some, deposit all and deposit some buttons to specific kinds of chests in Piratesoftware's minecraft server called Blockgame.
body:
# Blockgame Loot Buttons
A mod for Blockgame which adds buttons to chests and the player's inventory when they have a chest open. This currently works for vanilla chests & barrels, and all of blockgame's "booty" chests.

This mod uses the same Minecraft version required by the Blockgame server (1.21.4 as of July 2025)

This is an unofficial mod for Blockgame and is not affiliated with the Blockgame team and may suddenly vanish if the Blockgame Moderation team decides this is too much.

### How to use
Install the mod, and locate the nearest viable container (Chests, Large Chests, Barrels, Booty Containers). 
It should have 4 buttons. Two for looting and two for depositing.
These buttons also have registered hotkeys that can be changed in the vanilla Minecraft Keybinds menu.

To add an item to the ignore list (used by the "Loot Some" button) hold at least one in your hand and push "I". To remove and item from the list, hold at least one in your hand and push "Shift" + "I" (Or go look for the config file and feel free to edit the list manually).

### Disclaimer
This has been tested for single player survival and creative Minecraft 1.21.4 and on the Blockgame server. It probably will work on any 1.21.x version of Minecraft, but I have not tested it nor do I plan on actively supporting other versions. 


### Requirements
The following are required to run this mod:

Fabric API

In addition, the following mods are recommended:

Mod Menu, Cloth Config

### Credits
tubsausarus, creator & developer

Bjnc for creating BGI Parser (which this mod uses - see [here](https://github.com/blackjack26/bglib/tree/master))
